response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior engineer (~15 years) with strong full-stack, DLang, and Node.js/TypeScript background, but the role specifically requires deep C++ expertise, multi-threaded/networked systems, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity. C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015, with no evidence of industrial automation, secure development lifecycle, or relevant protocol experience (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.). Skill mismatch is significant despite the seniority match.
strengths: Senior-level experience (~15 years) across diverse stacks and systems
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing, mentoring, workshops
Some embedded/low-latency background (DLang microservices, NI LabWindows)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only ~6 months in 2014–2015
No exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No industrial automation, MQTT, or relevant protocol (Modbus, OPC UA, DNP 3.0) experience
